_comment: FieldCommand IMS WAN configuration. Copy to /opt/fieldcommand/data/wan_config.json and edit for your deployment. This file is never overwritten by updates.

primary_wan.label: Cellular
primary_wan.notes: Set admin_url to your cellular modem/router admin page IP. If your modem has no web UI, set detection_method to 'ping' and set ping_host. Examples: InstyConnect http://10.1.1.1 · Cradlepoint http://192.168.0.1 · Sierra Wireless varies by model.

secondary_wan.label: Satellite
secondary_wan.notes: Set ping_host to the satellite modem/router LAN address. Starlink default is 192.168.100.1. Hughes/ViaSat/OneWeb vary by model.

backup_drive.label: USB Backup Drive
backup_drive.notes: Format any USB drive (ext4 or exFAT) and label it FIELDCOMMAND. Any brand works — LaCie, SanDisk, WD, etc.
